plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Papzi to use your location to find nearby photographers.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Papzi needs your location to show nearby photographers.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Papzi needs your location to show nearby photographers.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Papzi needs photo access so you can upload high-quality posts.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Papzi needs permission to save edited photos when requested.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Papzi needs camera access for capturing and sharing photos.
